violations.text: No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. No employees visible at all, at front desk or kitchen. FMC arrived during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026
A bag of eggs observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

Bagged eggs observed thawing in the handwashing sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerators and freezers have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

The door to the outside, located in the lobby near the dining area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
Gallon jugs of a commercial disinfectant found in the kitchen that are not approved for food contact surfaces. EPA Website Registered Disinfectants New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
The stem food thermometer is lacking the calibration tool. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The door to the outside, located in the lobby near the dining area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2025
Sponges were observed at the 3 bay sink. Sponges may not be used in contact with cleaned and SANITIZED or in-use FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
Utensils in the kitchen are displayed with the food contact surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
Drain plugs are lacking for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer, trays on the storage shelf, and utensil storage containers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
